title: phanera tianlinensis
intro: Phanera tianlinensis, also known as Phanera tianlinensis, is a species of climbing plant in the family Dipterocarpaceae. It is a traditional medicinal plant used in Southeast Asian medicine, particularly in China and Thailand, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant's medicinal properties have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. Phanera tianlinensis is commonly prepared as a decoction or tea, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs in traditional herbal preparations.
